title: Automation and fluid polish
notes: Added early factory automation with standard chests, configurable hoppers, and mechanical pistons.
Reworked tanks and pipes so they show only the fluid they actually contain, with clearer flow and capacity readouts.
Balanced steam and LV recipe paths so machine processing is easier to leave running while later parts stay harder to make.
Improved steam, EU, and liquid transfer so connected machines share pipe and cable limits more consistently.
Polished mobile quest maps, recipe browsing, and machine panels so core screens are easier to use.
